title: Backend Developer
description: Build and maintain scalable server-side applications and RESTful APIs. Work with databases and cloud infrastructure to deliver reliable backend services.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create responsive and accessible user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks. Collaborate with designers and backend teams to deliver seamless user experiences.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop end-to-end web applications spanning frontend UI and backend services. Manage deployments and contribute across the entire technology stack.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze complex datasets to extract insights and build predictive models. Apply statistical methods and machine learning techniques to solve business problems.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Design and manage CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and cloud infrastructure. Ensure system reliability, scalability, and automated deployments.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and oversee cloud infrastructure strategies across multi-cloud environments. Define architecture standards and guide teams on cloud-native best practices.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy machine learning models into production systems. Optimize model performance and integrate ML pipelines with existing infrastructure.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor and protect organizational systems from security threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments, implement security controls, and respond to incidents.

title: Mobile Developer
description: Design and build mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms. Implement responsive UIs, integrate APIs, and ensure smooth cross-platform performance.

title: Project Manager
description: Define product vision and roadmap, prioritize features, and coordinate cross-functional teams. Bridge the gap between business goals and technical execution.
